---
title: "Other Tools"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
---

## About AFHI

Visit the [Australian Future Hearing Initiative](https://australianfuturehearing.org/) website for more information about the project.

## Hearing Tests

The Australian Future Hearing Initiative provides a [suite of web-based hearing tests and demos](https://afhi-hearing-tests.streamlit.app/) including:

* *Pure-Tone Audiometry*
* *Pip Pure-Tone Audiometry*
* *Consonant Confusion*
* *Categorical Loudness Scaling*
* *Tone Generator & Calibration*


Explore the source code at the [AFHI hearing tests GitHub repository](https://github.com/Australian-Future-Hearing-Initiative/afhi-hearing-tests-public) (licensed under CC-BY-NC).


## Acoustic & Hearing Machine Learning Models

* Explore models and datasets at the [prism-ml repository](https://github.com/Australian-Future-Hearing-Initiative/prism-ml)
